name: Document Signature Packet Builder
description: Builds a practical sign-here and logistics checklist for a document packet, while avoiding legal interpretation and directing the user to confirm issuer rules.
use_cases: Prepare a checklist of signature, date, initial, witness, notary, and attachment locations.
Organize document packet logistics before an appointment or submission.
Create a final review list of issuer rules and missing items to confirm.
safety_notes: Sign-here and logistics checklist only; no legal interpretation or advice.
Confirm signing rules, acceptable formats, notary requirements, witness rules, and submission instructions with the document issuer or qualified professional.
Do not tell the user whether signing is legally safe or what a clause means.
Do not invent document requirements or substitute for official instructions.
